summary: Comprehensive testing of CSV Import feature (iteration_66) - all tests passed. Backend: 22/22 pytest tests passed covering all import scenarios. Frontend: Import CSV button visible on Balances tab, dialog opens with mode selector and file input, all existing tabs work correctly (regression).

issues: Pre-existing React hydration warning: '<tr> cannot be a child of <span>' in table tbody - cosmetic, non-blocking

critical_code_review_comments: Backend inventory_ledger.py Lines 386-550: /import endpoint correctly implements CSV parsing with multipart form data
Backend: File hash includes customer_id + import_mode for uniqueness (SHA-256)
Backend: Duplicate opening_balance check per item/warehouse/ownership works correctly
Backend: Movements created with source_type='spreadsheet_import', reference_type='csv_import', created_by='gpi_hub_import'
Backend: Import batch ID format: CSV-YYYYMMDD-HHMMSS-{hash[:8]}
Backend: Column names normalized to lowercase with underscores, supports both 'uom' and 'unit_of_measure'
Frontend InventoryLedgerPage.js Lines 1138-1248: ImportCSVDialog correctly handles file upload, mode selection, and results display
Frontend: Import results show rows_processed, rows_imported, rows_failed with error details

seed_data_used: Used existing Hormel Foods workspace (ID: 366bfcce-4d68-4daf-b9f4-cb05a35de8c8). Test creates unique items with prefix TEST-IMPORT-{uuid} to avoid conflicts.
context_for_next_testing_agent: CSV Import feature fully tested. Endpoint: POST /api/inventory-ledger/import (multipart form data: file, customer_id, import_mode). Modes: opening_balance, manual_adjustment. Returns: success, import_batch_id, rows_processed, rows_imported, rows_failed, errors. Duplicate file protection via SHA-256 hash. Opening balance duplicates per item/warehouse/ownership rejected. Columns: item (required), qty (required), warehouse, ownership_type, uom/unit_of_measure, reference, notes, item_description. Frontend: Import CSV button on Balances tab, dialog with mode selector and file input, results display. Test data created with TEST-IMPORT- prefix.

error_codes.422: Validation error (invalid mode, missing columns, empty file)

import_button.location: Balances tab toolbar (next to Export CSV)
